title: More Nonsense Limerick 30
content:
There was a young person in red,
    Who carefully covered her head,
    With a bonnet of leather, 
    And three lines of feather,
    Besides some long ribands of red.
meaning:
"More Nonsense Limerick 30" is a quintessential example of Edward Lear's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
